Items.Title: React.Js 中的状态管理 | State Management in React.Js
Items.Description:
本周，我让自己玩弄了React Hooks ，以掌握它的工作原理、优点和权衡的基本概念。

我为利物浦足球俱乐部和曼联队开发了一个简单的记分牌迷你应用程序。 好主意对吧？
以下是有关它如何下降的一些亮点。

使用状态

使用减速器

上下文 API + useState

上下文 API + useReducer


我从这个练习中得出的结论是，与 useState 和 useReducer 在需要状态的多个组件中使用相同的逻辑实现相比，上下文 API 提供了高级抽象并使父组件及其子组件可以利用 DRY 原则访问状态。

当你只需要改变一个奇异的状态值并且考虑到它的冗长样板文件时，实现 useReducer 真的有点过头了。 当一个动作改变多个状态值时，useReducer 会派上用场，例如在购物车系统中，当您将商品添加到购物车时 - 商品数量、购物车中的商品、购物车中商品的总成本等等取决于复杂性。

谢谢阅读。 你对此有何看法？

注意这个空间

塞巴斯蒂安·马歇尔 - 一旦暂停，omohemma 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，omohemma 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，omohemma 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 omohemma 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文:

This week, I got myself playing around with React Hooks to grasp the underlying concepts on how it works, pros and tradeoffs.

I developed a simple scoreboard mini app for Liverpool FC versus Manchester United. Great idea right?
Here are some highlights on how it went down.

useState

useReducer

Context API + useState

Context API + useReducer


My takeaway from this exercise is that context API gives a high level abstraction and make state accessible to parent component and its children leveraging DRY principle compared to useState and useReducer been implemented with the same logic in multiple components that need the state.

useState and useReducer can be used independently of context API yet it fits perfectly into context API as state management grows.
It really an overkill to implement useReducer when all you have to mutate is a singular state value and also considering its verbose boilerplate. useReducer comes handy when an action mutate multiple state value e.g. in a cart system when you add an item to the cart - item(s) count, item(s) in cart, total cost of item(s) in cart, and possibly more depending on complexity.

Thank you reading. what's your thought on this?

PS: I'll be adding redux and its additives to this post soon. Watch out for this space

Mehedi Hasan Sagor - Jun 26

Sebastián Maciel - Jul 19

Helitha Rupasinghe - Jul 18

Once suspended, omohemma will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, omohemma will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by omohemma will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If omohemma is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
Items.Author: omohemma

Items.Title: 爪哇代码 | java code
Items.Description:
` /** * @author John Smith <john.smith@example.com> */ package l2f.gameserver.model ; public abstract strictfp class L2Char extends L2Object { public static final Short ERROR = 0x0001 ; public void moveTo ( int x , int y , int z ) { _ai = null ; log ( "Should not be called" ); if ( 1 > 5 ) { // wtf!? return ; } } } `

富兰克林马丁内斯—— 一旦暂停，karakib2k18 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，karakib2k18 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，karakib2k18 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 karakib2k18 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。



原文: 

`/** * @author John Smith <john.smith@example.com>
*/
package l2f.gameserver.model; public abstract strictfp class L2Char extends L2Object { public static final Short ERROR = 0x0001; public void moveTo(int x, int y, int z) { _ai = null; log("Should not be called"); if (1 > 5) { // wtf!? return; } }
}`

Franklin Martinez - Jul 20

Shubhendra Singh Chauhan - Jul 11

Once suspended, karakib2k18 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, karakib2k18 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by karakib2k18 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If karakib2k18 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.
Items.Author: karakib2k18
